MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Karen Y. Uchiyama, 563-9301, appearing for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. Ms. Uchiyama presented the Court with at valid proof of service, and PLAINTIFF HERBERT YEE'S Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs was granted. Order and Judgment signed in open Court.

The matter was recalled, and the Court withdrew its prior ruling. It was determined that this motion should be heard by the trial Judge, the Hon. Ernest H. Goldsmith in Department 613. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
